description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust wooden handle with a natural finish and a red-painted grip section near the base. The head of the axe is metallic, painted red with a silver cutting edge, and has a broad, flat poll opposite the blade, suitable for striking. The blade is wide and slightly curved, designed for efficient chopping or splitting. The handle is straight with a gentle taper, providing a secure grip and leverage for swinging. The red paint on both the head and lower handle adds visibility and a classic utilitarian look. No visible brand or manufacturer markings are present, and the overall construction suggests durability for heavy-duty urban or outdoor use.
description: A full-sized axe with a wooden handle and a red-painted metal head, featuring a wide silver blade and a red grip section.
description_view_0: Axe viewed from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden handle, the red grip, and the broad red and silver axe head.
description_view_2: Axe viewed from the bottom, displaying the pointed end of the blade and the handle's taper.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the axe head's geometry and handle's length.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a slight taper, natural finish, red-painted grip section, oval cross-section, no visible finger grooves.
attribute_blade_design: Single wide blade with a slightly curved edge, red-painted body, silver cutting edge, flat poll on the opposite side, no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle and secured, typical of classic axes.
